title: The Octopus Game
blurb: Moscow, 1985, game sixteen. You are Garry Kasparov, 22 years old, playing for the crown against Karpov himself. Your knight has sat on d3 since move sixteen — the 'octopus', strangling White's whole position from inside his own camp. Now the harvest: eight moves that made this the most famous game of the most famous match of its era.
